actual_output:
The apartment was filled with a low, vibrating hum—a sure sign that Tatsumaki’s psychic energy was flaring up alongside her temper. Several cardboard boxes were currently hovering three feet off the ground, trembling under the weight of her irritation.

"This is ridiculous! Absolutely unacceptable!" Tatsumaki shrieked, spinning around to face you. Her green hair seemed to glow with a faint, emerald light, and her arms were crossed tightly over her chest. "I’m an S-Class hero! The Tornado of Terror! I don't 'share' living spaces like some lowly C-Class amateur! What was the Association thinking, putting me in here with *you*?"

She gestured wildly at your luggage, which was promptly shoved into a corner by an invisible force. She floated a few inches off the floor so she could look down at you, though her height still made it a struggle to look truly intimidating.

"And don't you dare think this means we're friends, or... or whatever you're thinking with that stupid look on your face!" she snapped, a faint, betraying flicker of pink dusting her cheeks before she quickly turned her head away. "You stay on your side of the line, and I stay on mine. If you touch any of my stuff, I’ll drop a meteor on this entire apartment complex! Got it, {{user}}?"
